prompt: Surreal but physically plausible landscape scene with two separate small hills on either side where groups of people are clearly climbing upward toward their local peaks. In the center, the terrain connects into a much larger hidden slope that overall descends downward from left to right, so that when viewed as a whole landscape, all movement is actually going downhill. The perspective subtly reveals both local upward climbs and global downward slope at the same time. Natural lighting, realistic textures, wide angle view. Mood: uncanny, contradictory, visually confusing but believable. Composition emphasizes contrast between local slopes and global terrain. No text, no labels, no symbols, no charts.
visual_logic: People climb upward locally on separate hills, but the entire landscape slopes downward globally, showing how local trends reverse when combined.
